array.string: NGROK_URL=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$HOME/Library/Application Support/OrchestrateOS/data/system_identity.json')); print(d['ngrok_url'])"); NGROK_TOKEN=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$HOME/Library/Application Support/OrchestrateOS/data/system_identity.json')); print(d['ngrok_authtoken'])"); /usr/local/bin/ngrok http 5004 --url="$NGROK_URL" --authtoken="$NGROK_TOKEN"
